- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
Summary: Building a Python quantitative trading logic project (stock data, signals, risk, backtest, reporting).

- [x] Scaffold the Project
Summary: Created Python project structure and modules in src/quant_trading_logic with README, pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, tests, and VS Code debug config.

- [x] Customize the Project
Summary: Implemented data fetch, indicators (SMA/RSI/ATR), strategy signal logic, risk target/stop, backtest summary, CLI, and report formatters.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
Summary: No extensions were required by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project

- [x] Create and Run Task
Summary: Created and ran VS Code task "Run signal (AAPL)".

- [x] Launch the Project
Summary: User confirmed launch; added launch.json and started debug session.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
